arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Championship duo Stoke City and West Bromwich Albion are both keen on appointing a Manchester United cult hero as...

arts.ttl: Ben Gibson responds after Narcis Pelach axed by Stoke City
arts.sum: Captain Ben Gibson has thanked outgoing Narcis Pelach who was sacked as Stoke City boss last night following a dismal run of form that has left them anxiously looking over their shoulders in the Championship. Early bookies' favourites to replace Pelach are Mark Robins, who is free to manage again after being sacked by Coventry City before being replaced by Frank Lampard.

arts.ttl: Preview: Stoke City vs. Sunderland - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Stoke City and Sunderland, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Stoke City sack Narcis Pelach after 19 matches in charge
arts.sum: Stoke City announce that they have sacked head coach Narcis Pelach after just three months in charge of the Championship club.

arts.ttl: Stoke sack head coach Narcís Pelach after three months in charge
arts.sum: Pelach only won three of 18 Championship matches Stoke looking for third head coach of the season Stoke have sacked Narcís Pelach after only 19 games as head coach, the Championship club have announced. Pelach, who was appointed in September at the age of 36 after replacing Steven Schumacher, won just three of the 18 league games for which he was in charge and departs after a 2-0 Boxing Day defeat at home against Leeds which left Stoke sitting in 19th place in the table, three points clear of the relegation zone. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Sympathy for sacked Narcis Pelach but 'shambles' Stoke City sent brutal message
arts.sum: The Catalan was only appointed in September after the sacking of Steven Schumacher, and his dismissal sparked an outpouring of anger from Stoke City supporters. Stoke have sacked head coach Narcis Pelach after just 19 games - and fans have been quick to have their say on the decision.

arts.ttl: Narcis Pelach's final words as Stoke City head coach with pressure showing and transfer need highlighted
arts.sum: Pelach spoke about the need for new blood and the equivalent of new signings from within his own squad, such as Sam Gallagher, Bosun Lawal, Lynden Gooch and Ben Pearson, who are hoping to play bigger parts after being stuck in the treatment room for much of his three months in charge. “We have to bring players in during January because the league is very tough and Stoke City needs more players.”

arts.ttl: Stoke sack Pelach after just three months in charge
arts.sum: Stoke City part company with head coach Narcis Pelach following a nine-game winless run.
